## Meeting Purpose

[Q\&A session with GrowthX on data and tech SEO for Siit.io, focusing on analytics setup, content performance, and optimization strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/_aDZoe39SAxaBd9eBvz_a39U-pxrP56Y?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [PostHog and Google Analytics 4 data need proper setup for accurate conversion tracking](https://fathom.video/share/_aDZoe39SAxaBd9eBvz_a39U-pxrP56Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Content production and distribution should be prioritized over technical AI optimization](https://fathom.video/share/_aDZoe39SAxaBd9eBvz_a39U-pxrP56Y?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Monthly reporting cadence agreed upon for more meaningful insights](https://fathom.video/share/_aDZoe39SAxaBd9eBvz_a39U-pxrP56Y?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Focus on building authority through quality content and partnerships rather than solely technical SEO tactics](https://fathom.video/share/_aDZoe39SAxaBd9eBvz_a39U-pxrP56Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2501.0)

## Topics

### Analytics Setup and Conversion Tracking

  - [Current setup: PostHog for granular data, Google Analytics 4 (GA4) for general trends](https://fathom.video/share/_aDZoe39SAxaBd9eBvz_a39U-pxrP56Y?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Key conversion events: "Sign up for free trial" and "Book a demo"](https://fathom.video/share/_aDZoe39SAxaBd9eBvz_a39U-pxrP56Y?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [PostHog custom events and actions not properly capturing full conversion funnel](https://fathom.video/share/_aDZoe39SAxaBd9eBvz_a39U-pxrP56Y?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [GA4 showing some conversion data, but potential setup issues identified](https://fathom.video/share/_aDZoe39SAxaBd9eBvz_a39U-pxrP56Y?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [Action item: Branko to investigate and optimize PostHog/GA4 setup for accurate tracking](https://fathom.video/share/_aDZoe39SAxaBd9eBvz_a39U-pxrP56Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)

### Content Performance Analysis

  - [Recent traffic spike attributed to trade show attendance and AI agent launch](https://fathom.video/share/_aDZoe39SAxaBd9eBvz_a39U-pxrP56Y?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Google Ads performance improving, with synergies between paid and organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/_aDZoe39SAxaBd9eBvz_a39U-pxrP56Y?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Top-performing content includes IT help desk topics and migration-related articles](https://fathom.video/share/_aDZoe39SAxaBd9eBvz_a39U-pxrP56Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
  - [French blog content showing surprising performance](https://fathom.video/share/_aDZoe39SAxaBd9eBvz_a39U-pxrP56Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2065.0)
  - [Need for better understanding of content-driven conversions and referral traffic](https://fathom.video/share/_aDZoe39SAxaBd9eBvz_a39U-pxrP56Y?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)

### SEO and AI Optimization Strategies

  - [Focus on producing high-quality, authoritative content over technical optimizations](https://fathom.video/share/_aDZoe39SAxaBd9eBvz_a39U-pxrP56Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2516.0)
  - [Prioritize content distribution and partnerships for exponential growth](https://fathom.video/share/_aDZoe39SAxaBd9eBvz_a39U-pxrP56Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2801.0)
  - [Schema markup useful but not critical; focus on other authority signals](https://fathom.video/share/_aDZoe39SAxaBd9eBvz_a39U-pxrP56Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2687.0)
  - [Explore distribution channels like Reddit for increased visibility](https://fathom.video/share/_aDZoe39SAxaBd9eBvz_a39U-pxrP56Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2912.0)
  - [Utilize blog and glossary content as potential link magnets](https://fathom.video/share/_aDZoe39SAxaBd9eBvz_a39U-pxrP56Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2939.0)

### Reporting and Decision Making

  - [GrowthX developing standardized Looker-based report across clients](https://fathom.video/share/_aDZoe39SAxaBd9eBvz_a39U-pxrP56Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2227.0)
  - [Monthly reporting cadence agreed upon to avoid over-analysis of short-term fluctuations](https://fathom.video/share/_aDZoe39SAxaBd9eBvz_a39U-pxrP56Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2231.0)
  - [Branko to create a Loom video summarizing GA, PostHog, and Google Ads insights](https://fathom.video/share/_aDZoe39SAxaBd9eBvz_a39U-pxrP56Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)

  - [Discussion on Jewish presence in Slovakia and repurposed synagogues](https://fathom.video/share/_aDZoe39SAxaBd9eBvz_a39U-pxrP56Y?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
